description_long: This is a simple, linear metal fence composed of evenly spaced vertical bars connected by two horizontal rails at the top and bottom. The vertical bars are straight and uniform in height, with no decorative elements or finials on top. The structure is minimalistic, with a utilitarian design commonly found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or around public infrastructure. The fence appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or iron, and is painted or coated in a solid black color. The top edge of the fence is flat, and the posts do not feature any caps or embellishments. The overall appearance is functional, providing a clear barrier without obstructing visibility.
description: A minimalistic black metal fence with evenly spaced vertical bars and two horizontal rails, featuring a flat top and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence with all vertical bars and both horizontal rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the fence, with only the edge of the vertical bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, showing the vertical bars and horizontal rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile with minimal visible detail.
